sentence: 爷爷每天早上喜欢在公园读报。
pinyin: Yéye měitiān zǎoshang xǐhuān zài gōngyuán dú bào.
english: Grandpa likes to read the newspaper in the park every morning.

sentence: 今年夏天的音乐节门票已经卖完了。
pinyin: Jīnnián xiàtiān de yīnyuèjié ménpiào yǐjīng mài wán le.
english: Tickets for this summer's music festival are already sold out.

sentence: 新市长公布了他的施政计划。
pinyin: Xīn shìzhǎng gōngbùle tā de shīzhèng jìhuà.
english: The new mayor announced his administration plan.

sentence: 这首歌有一种让人放松的魔力。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu gē yǒu yī zhǒng ràng rén fàngsōng de mólì.
english: This song has a magical power that makes people relax.

sentence: 他大一就通过了英语四级考试。
pinyin: Tā dà yī jiù tōngguòle Yīngyǔ Sì Jí kǎoshì.
english: He passed the CET-4 English exam in his first year of college.

meaning: 1. to merge into; 2. to incorporate in
sentence: 那家小公司被并入了一个大集团。
pinyin: Nà jiā xiǎo gōngsī bèi bìng rù le yī gè dà jítuán.
english: That small company was merged into a large conglomerate.

meaning: 1. to try hard to; 2. to strive to
sentence: 她力图在期末考试中取得好成绩。
pinyin: Tā lìtú zài qīmò kǎoshì zhōng qǔdé hǎo chéngjì.
english: She strives to get good results in her final exams.

sentence: 古希腊的哲学思想影响了整个西方世界。
pinyin: Gǔ Xīlà de zhéxué sīxiǎng yǐngxiǎngle zhěnggè xīfāng shìjiè.
english: The philosophical thought of ancient Greece influenced the entire Western world.

sentence: 他一直奉行诚实做人的原则。
pinyin: Tā yīzhí fèngxíng chéngshí zuòrén de yuánzé.
english: He has always pursued the principle of being an honest person.

meaning: 1. tide of thought; 2. way of thinking characteristic of a historical
sentence: 二十世纪初各种思潮在社会上广泛传播。
pinyin: Èrshí shìjì chū gè zhǒng sīcháo zài shèhuì shàng guǎngfàn chuánbō.
english: At the beginning of the twentieth century, various currents of thought spread widely in society.

sentence: 海边的灯塔在夜里为船只指引方向。
pinyin: Hǎibiān de dēngtǎ zài yèlǐ wèi chuánzhī zhǐyǐn fāngxiàng.
english: The lighthouse by the sea guides ships in the night.

sentence: 他的手表表带断了，需要换一条。
pinyin: Tā de shǒubiǎo biǎodài duàn le, xūyào huàn yī tiáo.
english: His watch strap broke and needs to be replaced.

sentence: 球迷们高呼着球员的名字。
pinyin: Qiúmímen gāohū zhe qiúyuán de míngzi.
english: The fans shouted the players' names loudly.

sentence: 长时间走路后，她的双腿很酸。
pinyin: Cháng shíjiān zǒulù hòu, tā de shuāngtuǐ hěn suān.
english: After walking for a long time, both her legs ached.

sentence: 导演扛着摄影机在拍摄现场工作。
pinyin: Dǎoyǎn káng zhe shèyǐngjī zài pāishè xiànchǎng gōngzuò.
english: The director was working on set with a movie camera on his shoulder.

sentence: 老师让我们找出句子中的副词。
pinyin: Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen zhǎochū jùzi zhōng de fùcí.
english: The teacher asked us to identify the adverbs in the sentences.

sentence: 审判长宣布法庭现在开庭。
pinyin: Shěnpànzhǎng xuānbù fǎtíng xiànzài kāitíng.
english: The presiding judge announced that the court was now in session.

sentence: 他何以如此确定这个答案是对的？
pinyin: Tā héyǐ rúcǐ quèdìng zhège dá'àn shì duì de?
english: How can he be so certain that this answer is correct?

sentence: 合唱团里有人唱歌失调，听起来很奇怪。
pinyin: Héchàngtuán lǐ yǒu rén chànggē shīdiào, tīng qǐlái hěn qíguài.
english: Someone in the choir sang out of tune, which sounded very strange.

sentence: 他把美元换成了卢布准备去旅游。
pinyin: Tā bǎ měiyuán huàn chéngle Lúbù zhǔnbèi qù lǚyóu.
english: He exchanged US dollars for rubles to prepare for his trip.

meaning: 1. to be terrified; 2. to terrify sb
sentence: 突然的雷声把小孩吓坏了。
pinyin: Tūrán de léishēng bǎ xiǎohái xià huài le.
english: The sudden sound of thunder terrified the child.

sentence: 天气太热，加之路途遥远，大家都很累。
pinyin: Tiānqì tài rè, jiāzhī lùtú yáoyuǎn, dàjiā dōu hěn lèi.
english: The weather was too hot, and moreover the journey was long, so everyone was exhausted.

sentence: 婴儿含住乳头才能顺利喝到母乳。
pinyin: Yīng'ér hán zhù rǔtóu cái néng shùnlì hē dào mǔrǔ.
english: The baby needs to latch onto the nipple to successfully drink breast milk.

meaning: 1. to enliven; 2. to invigorate; 3. to revitalize
sentence: 政府出台新政策来搞活当地经济。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ chūtái xīn zhèngcè lái gǎohuó dāngdì jīngjì.
english: The government introduced new policies to invigorate the local economy.

sentence: 这家店拿到了特许经营权才能开业。
pinyin: Zhè jiā diàn ná dàole tèxǔ jīngyíng quán cái néng kāiyè.
english: This store had to obtain a franchise license before it could open.

meaning: 1. title granted to a person (archaic); 2. to ban an (online) account
sentence: 他因为发布违规内容被平台封号了。
pinyin: Tā yīnwèi fābù wéiguī nèiróng bèi píngtái fēng hào le.
english: His account was banned by the platform for posting prohibited content.

sentence: 她不小心把书页撕破了一角。
pinyin: Tā bù xiǎoxīn bǎ shūyè sī pò le yī jiǎo.
english: She accidentally tore a corner off the page of the book.

sentence: 学数学要先掌握基本概念。
pinyin: Xué shùxué yào xiān zhǎngwò jīběn gàiniàn.
english: To study math, you need to first master the basic concepts.

sentence: 小女孩一直叫着妈咪，不肯离开。
pinyin: Xiǎo nǚhái yīzhí jiào zhe māmī, bù kěn líkāi.
english: The little girl kept calling for mommy and refused to leave.

meaning: 1. representative work (of an author or artist)
sentence: 《红楼梦》是中国古典文学的代表作之一。
pinyin: 《Hónglóumèng》 shì Zhōngguó gǔdiǎn wénxué de dàibiǎozuò zhī yī.
english: Dream of the Red Chamber is one of the masterpieces of Chinese classical literature.

sentence: 连接电池时要注意分清正极和负极。
pinyin: Liánjiē diànchí shí yào zhùyì fēnqīng zhèngjí hé fùjí.
english: When connecting a battery, pay attention to telling the positive and negative poles apart.

meaning: new policy; New Deal (Roosevelt's 1933 policy to deal with the Great D
sentence: 市长上任后推出了一系列新政。
pinyin: Shìzhǎng shàngrèn hòu tuīchūle yī xìliè xīnzhèng.
english: After taking office, the mayor introduced a series of new policies.

meaning: to cheat (sb out of sth); to swindle (sb out of sth)
sentence: 他被人假冒客服骗走了两万块钱。
pinyin: Tā bèi rén jiǎmào kèfú piànzǒule liǎng wàn kuài qián.
english: He was swindled out of twenty thousand yuan by someone posing as customer service.

meaning: within and without the borders; domestic and foreign; home and abroad
sentence: 这家公司在境内外都有业务。
pinyin: Zhè jiā gōngsī zài jìng nèi wài dōu yǒu yèwù.
english: This company has operations both within and outside the country.

sentence: 他因为迟到太多次被学校记过处分。
pinyin: Tā yīnwèi chídào tài duō cì bèi xuéxiào jìguò chǔfèn.
english: He received a demerit from the school for being late too many times.

meaning: (TCM) set prescription (i.e. medicine specifically prescribed for a de
sentence: 医生开了一个治咳嗽的成方给他。
pinyin: Yīshēng kāile yī gè zhì késou de chéngfāng gěi tā.
english: The doctor prescribed a set TCM formula to treat his cough.

meaning: to be in charge of (a major area of responsibility); person in charge;
sentence: 他是这栋大楼的总管，什么事都归他处理。
pinyin: Tā shì zhè dòng dàlóu de zǒngguǎn, shénme shì dōu guī tā chǔlǐ.
english: He's the building manager — everything is handled by him.

meaning: (attributive) to be enrolled in a school (or university etc)
sentence: 在校学生可以享受半价优惠。
pinyin: Zài xiào xuésheng kěyǐ xiǎngshòu bànjià yōuhuì.
english: Students currently enrolled in school can enjoy a half-price discount.

meaning: White area (area controlled by the KMT during the Second Revolutionary
sentence: 历史书里提到了当年白区地下党的活动。
pinyin: Lìshǐ shū lǐ tídàole dāngnián báiqū dìxià dǎng de huódòng.
english: The history book mentions the underground party activities in the White areas back then.

sentence: 农民正在田里插水稻秧苗。
pinyin: Nóng mín zhèng zài tián lǐ chā shuǐ dào yāng miáo.
english: Farmers are planting rice seedlings in the fields.

sentence: 太阳直射头顶，热得难受。
pinyin: Tài yáng zhí shè tóu dǐng, rè de nán shòu.
english: The sun was beating down on top of our heads — unbearably hot.

sentence: 他在大家面前说错话，感到很难堪。
pinyin: Tā zài dàjiā miànqián shuō cuò huà, gǎndào hěn nánkān.
english: He felt very embarrassed after saying the wrong thing in front of everyone.

meaning: outlook; prospect; to look ahead; look forward to
sentence: 大家对新的一年充满展望。
pinyin: Dàjiā duì xīn de yī nián chōngmǎn zhǎnwàng.
english: Everyone is filled with anticipation for the new year.

meaning: 1. knapsack; 2. rucksack; 3. infantry pack; 4. field pack; 5. blanket
sentence: 她把书和水壶都放进了背包里。
pinyin: Tā bǎ shū hé shuǐ hú dōu fàng jìn le bēi bāo lǐ.
english: She put her books and water bottle into the backpack.

sentence: 他小时候在村里的学堂读书。
pinyin: Tā xiǎo shí hou zài cūn lǐ de xué táng dú shū.
english: When he was young, he studied at the village school.

sentence: 这次音乐节是年度最大的盛会。
pinyin: Zhè cì yīnyuèjié shì niándù zuì dà de shènghuì.
english: This music festival is the biggest event of the year.

meaning: 1. thorough and detailed; 2. exhaustive; 3. the tedious details in ful
sentence: 她的报告写得非常详尽，每个细节都有说明。
pinyin: Tā de bàogào xiě de fēicháng xiáng jìn, měi gè xìjié dōu yǒu shuōmíng.
english: Her report was extremely thorough, with every detail explained.

sentence: 她是一名白领，每天坐班到很晚。
pinyin: Tā shì yī míng báilǐng, měitiān zuòbān dào hěn wǎn.
english: She's a white-collar worker who stays at the office late every day.

meaning: 1. to pass through a country's territory; 2. transit
sentence: 他在香港过境，转机去美国。
pinyin: Tā zài Xiānggǎng guò jìng, zhuǎn jī qù Měiguó.
english: He transited through Hong Kong to catch a connecting flight to the US.

sentence: 她高中选择了文科方向。
pinyin: Tā gāozhōng xuǎnzé le wénkē fāngxiàng.
english: She chose the humanities track in high school.
